rows.notes: All extractors agree. Clearly a header with no amounts. Visually centered on the page.

Values for Pounds and Shillings are agreed by both extractors. Visual inspection confirms pence is a distinct '6', as identified by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini's interpretation of a dash/overlined zero was incorrect.

Pounds '1' and shillings '7' are clear. Visual inspection of the pence column shows a '0' with a horizontal stroke, correctly interpreted as 0 pence by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misidentified it as '6' despite noting ambiguity. Description corrected to 'Mr Combos' based on image.

Visual inspection reveals '0' in Pounds, '1' in Shillings, and a dash (0) in Pence. gemini-flash was correct on shillings and pence. Both extractors had inaccuracies in their full readings, requiring a visual override.

rows.description: paid for flooring of Room over ye new Bursary
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms '0' in Pounds, '10' in Shillings, and '0' in Pence. gemini-flash was accurate for all values and its note on pence interpretation is consistent. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '7' for pounds.

rows.description: paid Mr Collins in full of his first Bill of Candles
rows.notes: Pounds '21' and pence '0' (dash) are clear. Visual inspection confirms shillings is a single digit '3', as read by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '10' for shillings. Description corrected to 'Mr Collins' based on image.

rows.description: paid Dod for lighting of Winter Lamps
rows.notes: Pounds '1' and pence '0' (dash) are clear. Visual inspection confirms shillings is '3', as identified by gpt-5-mini, despite gemini-flash interpreting it as empty/0.

rows.description: paid Cook Acc: Dinner & Xtmas Gaudies
rows.notes: Pounds '15' and pence '4' are clear. Visual inspection confirms the shillings column is empty, hence 0 shillings, as read by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '15' in the shillings column. Description corrected to 'Cook Acc: Dinner & Xtmas Gaudies' based on image.

rows.description: paid into ye Treasury chest 200 Guineas
rows.notes: Pounds '210' is clear and correctly calculated from '200 Guineas'. Visual inspection confirms shillings and pence columns are visibly empty, consistent with 0s 0d. gemini-flash accurately identified empty columns, while gpt-5-mini incorrectly read '4' shillings and a dash for pence where none exists.

Visual inspection confirms '0' in Pounds, '1' in Shillings, and a dash (0) in Pence. gpt-5-mini was accurate for shillings and pence. gemini-flash misread shillings as '0' and identified pounds as empty rather than '0'.

rows.description: paid Mr Horner for Battle Books, Ink & Paper
rows.notes: Visual inspection confirms '0' in Pounds, '17' in Shillings, and '6' in Pence. gemini-flash accurately extracted these values. gpt-5-mini's readings for shillings and pence were incorrect despite acknowledging faintness.

rows.description: paid the Cooks Bill for washing of Hall, Mops &c
rows.notes: All extractors agree on values and type. Visual inspection confirms '3£ 13s 4d'.

Visual inspection confirms 'Soluta' is a header, but also clearly includes a total amount '278£ 7s 4d' to its right. Therefore, it is classified as 'total'. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the values and type, gemini-flash classified it as a header without amounts.

Visual inspection confirms 'Ditto' acts as a continuation header, but clearly includes a total amount '73£ 19s 2d' to its right. Therefore, it is classified as 'total'. gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the values and type, gemini-flash classified it as a header without amounts.

Consensus on Pounds, Shillings, and Pence. Visual inspection confirms a 'ob' symbol after '10' pence, indicating a half-penny (0.5). gemini-flash correctly identified and interpreted this fraction; gpt-5-mini missed it.

rows.description: Ex Receptis quae erant A. Dob. Anno praecedentis
rows.notes: Consensus on Pounds, Shillings, and Pence. Visual inspection confirms a 'ob' symbol after '10' pence, indicating a half-penny (0.5). gemini-flash correctly identified and interpreted this fraction. Description corrected based on image, as gpt-5-mini had 'sunt ab Anni'.
Consensus on Pounds, Shillings, and Pence. Visual inspection confirms a 'ob' symbol after '10' pence, indicating a half-penny (0.5). gemini-flash correctly identified and interpreted this fraction.
All extractors agree on values and type. Visual inspection confirms '168£ 4s 9d'. Description corrected based on image, as gpt-5-mini had 'Pro Computante'.
